description_long: This is a single-story, modern ranch-style house with a sprawling rectangular footprint and an expansive wraparound wooden deck. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, punctuated by numerous large windows that allow for ample natural light. The house features multiple entry points, including a prominent main entrance with a covered porch supported by slender columns. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic, and the layout suggests an open-plan interior with several distinct rooms and hallways. Decorative elements such as wall art and shelving are visible through the windows, adding a lived-in feel. The house is surrounded by a series of posts, likely for supporting a future railing or awning.
description: A modern, single-story ranch house with a flat roof, wraparound wooden deck, and large windows throughout. The light exterior and open layout give it a contemporary, airy appearance.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance with a covered porch, large windows, and the extensive wooden deck at the front.
description_view_1: This angle shows the rear of the house, featuring more windows, visible interior wall art, and the continuation of the deck.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the length of the house, the flat roof, and the deck extending along the side with multiple access points.
description_view_3: This perspective displays the opposite end of the house, with additional windows and the deck wrapping around, as well as the posts outlining the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with slender columns, wide steps, and a modern door flanked by large windows.
